title: Duba Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Duba with a Z-Score of +3.86. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Duba is categorized as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 12.5 GG, while the relative humidity is at 35%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 20.7 km/h, but it is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
